title: Storage in Arundel | Wolves Storage Sussex
meta: Managed storage in Arundel, West Sussex from £15/week. We pack, collect & store across BN18 — perfect for moves, downsizing & antiques. Get a free quote.
hero_alt: Wolves Storage wooden container being collected from a period home beneath Arundel Castle, West Sussex
sub: From the historic streets beneath Arundel Castle to the riverside homes along the Arun, we come to you — packing, collecting and storing your belongings in our alarmed Ashington warehouse, from just £15 a week with collection and redelivery included.

We pack, seal & store in our Ashington warehouse
s1_h2: Managed Storage in Arundel — We Come to You
s1: Arundel’s steep High Street, the narrow lanes around Tarrant Street and the period cottages beneath the Castle and Cathedral are wonderful to live in — but not so easy to move out of. Tight kerbsides, the one-way system off the A27 and limited parking make hauling boxes to a distant unit a real headache. That’s why we bring fully managed container storage straight to your BN18 door instead.

Our family team wraps and packs your belongings, loads them into private wooden containers and drives them to our alarmed warehouse in Ashington — just over twenty minutes north via the A284 and A283. You never hire a van or lift a thing. See exactly how our managed storage works, then book a collection slot that suits your day.
img2_alt: Wolves family team packing antiques into wooden storage containers at an Arundel home
s2_h2: Storage for Arundel’s Movers, Downsizers & Antique Owners
s2: Arundel has long been a magnet for collectors, with antiques dealers along Tarrant Street and the Castle drawing visitors all year. As a LAPADA-accredited firm, we know how to wrap and protect period furniture, paintings and delicate heirlooms — so whether you’re clearing a Maltravers Street townhouse or thinning out before a downsize, your pieces are handled with proper care. Ask about our dedicated furniture storage.

We also help families bridging a broken chain on a riverside purchase, holiday-let owners storing between seasons, and businesses near the town centre or Ford needing room for stock. Whether you need a few weeks or a few years, the same managed service applies, all from just £15 a week with no deposit and nothing to drive to.
img3_alt: Sealed wooden storage containers stacked inside the alarmed Ashington warehouse near Arundel
s3_h2: Storage Across Arundel & the Arun Valley
s3: From our Ashington base we cover the whole Arun Valley, collecting daily from Arundel and the surrounding villages — Lyminster, Walberton, Slindon, Burpham and Amberley. If you’re just down the A284 we also run regular collections in Littlehampton, while neighbours along the coast can read about our storage in Worthing.

Heading inland beneath the Downs we serve Findon too, so wherever your move takes you the same sealed-container service follows. Tell us roughly what you need to store and we’ll send a clear, no-obligation quote within 24 hours — with collection from your Arundel door and redelivery both included.
img4_alt: Wolves Storage van redelivering boxes to a customer in Arundel town centre, BN18
faqs: Do you collect from Arundel town centre?

Yes — we collect right across Arundel and BN18, including the narrow streets around the Castle, Tarrant Street and Maltravers Street. Our team handles tight kerbsides and the A27 one-way system, so you never drive a single box anywhere.
Where will my belongings actually be stored?

Everything is stored at our alarmed warehouse in Ashington, RH20 3JT — roughly twenty minutes north of Arundel via the A284 and A283. Your goods stay sealed in private wooden containers with 24/7 CCTV and full insurance.
Can you store antiques and period furniture?

Absolutely. As a LAPADA-accredited firm we regularly wrap and store antiques, paintings and heirlooms from Arundel’s many period homes and dealers. Each piece is professionally protected and sealed in its own container until you want it redelivered.
How much does storage in Arundel cost?

Managed storage starts at just £15 per week with no deposit and no hidden fees. Collection from your Arundel home and later redelivery are both included, and your free quote is confirmed within 24 hours.
I’m caught in a chain delay near Arundel — can you help quickly?

Yes. Chain delays are common on riverside and Castle-view sales, so our short-term storage is billed weekly with no long contract. We can often collect within a few days and bring everything back when you complete.
cta: Need Storage in Arundel? Get a Free Quote

s1_h2: Managed Storage in Petworth — We Come to You
s1: Petworth has no shortage of homes that need clearing, downsizing or protecting — from Georgian townhouses along Lombard Street and East Street to cottages out towards Tillington and Byworth. Tucked behind the high walls of Petworth House and reached only by the narrow A272 and A283, the town isn’t built for hiring a van and hauling boxes off to a storage unit. So we don’t ask you to. s2_h2: Antiques & Fine Furniture Storage in the Antiques Capital
s2: Petworth is the antiques capital of the South — the dealers around Golden Square and Lombard Street and the twice-yearly Petworth Park Antiques fair draw collectors from across the country. That means the things people here need to store are rarely just cardboard boxes: they’re bureaus, longcase clocks, gilt mirrors and inherited dining suites that have to be handled properly. As a LAPADA-accredited removals and storage firm, that is exactly our world.

Every piece is blanket- or export-wrapped, padded and sealed into a clean, dry, individually logged container — never stacked on open shelving or left exposed to damp. Whether you’re a dealer holding stock between fairs or a homeowner protecting heirlooms during a renovation, our specialist furniture storage keeps fine pieces in the same condition you handed them to us, for a few weeks or a few years.

We cover the neighbouring towns too, so if friends or family nearby need a hand you can point them our way. img4_alt: Wolves Storage team redelivering wrapped furniture to a Petworth property

Absolutely. As a LAPADA-accredited firm we handle fine furniture and antiques daily — export-wrapping, blanket-wrapping and sealing each piece into a clean, dry, individually logged container, ideal for the kind of pieces Petworth’s dealers and homeowners trust us with.

s1_h2: Managed Storage in Chichester — We Come to You
s1: Tucked at the western edge of our patch, Chichester sits where the A27 sweeps past the cathedral and the A286 heads north toward Midhurst. Rather than renting a self-storage unit on one of the city’s trading estates and hauling boxes back and forth, you let us come to you — we arrive at your home anywhere across PO19, then pack, wrap and seal your belongings into your own wooden container.

Everything is loaded and taken back to our dry, alarmed indoor warehouse near Ashington, then redelivered whenever you’re ready — usually on a day’s notice. It’s fully managed from £15 a week with no deposit to find. Take a look at how it works or check our straightforward storage prices.
img2_alt: Wolves Storage Sussex loading a container for a Chichester customer
s2_h2: Storage for Students, Downsizers & Chichester Businesses
s2: With the University of Chichester drawing students into the city each year, term-end storage is one of our busiest jobs here — we collect sealed boxes from halls or a rented room and bring them back in September. Downsizers leaving a family home near the cathedral or out toward the harbour use us to bridge the gap between selling and settling.

Independent shops, galleries and offices around the city centre and the Festival Theatre quarter lean on our business storage for stock and archives, while families turn to us during renovations and chain delays between buying and selling. Whatever you’re storing, it stays sealed, fully insured and watched over by 24/7 CCTV.
img3_alt: A sealed wooden container packed with a Chichester customer's belongings
s3: Chichester sits at the far western edge of our coverage, with Chichester Harbour and the South Downs on the doorstep, yet our managed model means distance is no barrier — we plan the run east along the A27 back to our warehouse and handle every box for you. There’s nothing to drive to and no unit to rent.

We also serve the towns just inland and along the coast, so neighbours often compare notes — head up the A286 for storage in Midhurst, take the A285 toward storage in Petworth, or follow the A27 east for storage in Arundel, all run from the same Ashington base.
img4_alt: Inside the alarmed Ashington warehouse storing Chichester customers' containers
faqs: Do you cover all of Chichester?

Yes — we collect, store and redeliver right across PO19 and the surrounding villages, from the cathedral city centre out toward the harbour and up the A286, so wherever you are in Chichester we can come to you.
Do I have to drive to a storage unit?

No — that’s the whole point of managed storage. Instead of renting a unit on a Chichester trading estate, we come to your home, pack and seal everything, then store it and bring it back when you need it.
How much is storage in Chichester?

Storage starts from £15 per week per container with no deposit and no hidden fees. Collection from across Chichester and redelivery are included, so the price you’re quoted covers the packing, transport and secure storage too.
Do you offer student storage in Chichester?

Yes — we’re popular with University of Chichester students. We collect your sealed boxes at the end of term from halls or a rented room, store them safely over summer and redeliver when you return in September.
Is my storage secure and insured?

Yes — your belongings travel in sealed wooden containers to our alarmed indoor warehouse near Ashington, kept under 24/7 CCTV and fully insured. We’re LAPADA accredited, Checkatrade-verified and rated 5.0 from 478 reviews.
cta: Need Storage in Chichester? Get a Free Quote
